description: In the WordPress admin panel, clean up and reorganize the site's categories and tags to impose a proper content structure before a site redesign launches. Rename the category 'Techology' to 'Technology', delete the 'Miscellaneous Stuff' category, and create a new top-level category named 'Content Hub'. Organize the 'Technology', 'Travel', and 'Lifestyle' categories as children of 'Content Hub'. Additionally, add the tag 'featured' to the three most recently published posts without removing their existing tags, and delete the 'temp-draft-marker' tag.
